name: Corn Tortillas
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir masa harina and water together until dough holds together in a ball.
2. Turn the dough onto a working surface dusted with masa harina.
3. Knead the dough quickly into a smooth ball.
4. Divide the dough into twelve pieces.
5. Roll one piece of dough into a ball and place between two sheets of wax paper, flattening slightly.
6. Press each tortilla (still in wax paper) in a tortilla press until the tortilla measures about 6 inches in diameter. Repeat with remaining pieces of dough, stacking them under a damp tea towel until ready for use.
7. When ready to cook, preheat a seasoned cast iron griddle over medium-high heat.
8. Remove the wax paper from each tortilla and place it on the griddle, turning frequently until dry and golden, about 1 to 2 minutes. Repeat with remaining tortillas.
